metadata.title: Piano Lessons for Ottawa | Private and Group | Piano a Tempo
metadata.description: Live in Ottawa? Our school is in Gatineau with flexible options: private lessons, group classes, and online learning.
metadata.openGraphDescription: Private lessons, group classes, and online options for Ottawa families.

hero.title: Piano Lessons for Ottawa Families
hero.description: Our school is located in Gatineau and already welcomes students from Ottawa in both private and group formats.

why.title: Why choose Piano a Tempo
why.description: Many clients already travel to Gatineau to benefit from consistent, supportive teaching tailored to their musical goals.

cta.title: We help you pick the right format
cta.description: Share your Ottawa area, level, and schedule and we will suggest the most practical in-person or online option.
